title: Add Greeting and Math Utilities
summary: Add two utility modules (greet, calc) with type hints, docstrings, and tests

phases.name: Utility Modules
phases.description: Create the greet and calc modules with all functions

tasks.name: Create greet module
tasks.description: Create src/greet.py with hello(name: str) -> str and goodbye(name: str) -> str. Both return formatted strings. Include type hints and docstrings.

tasks.name: Create calc module
tasks.description: Create src/calc.py with add(a: int, b: int) -> int and multiply(a: int, b: int) -> int. Include type hints and docstrings.

phases.name: Tests
phases.description: Add pytest tests for both modules

tasks.name: Test greet module
tasks.description: Create tests/test_greet.py with tests for hello() and goodbye(). Test with normal names, empty string, and special characters.

tasks.name: Test calc module
tasks.description: Create tests/test_calc.py with tests for add() and multiply(). Test with positive, negative, and zero values.
